description: 18 topics + Topic 1b organised into three layers (Foundation, Clinical, Context/Future). Baseline is 2 T1 seeds per topic, with additional seeds added where citation-structure coverage is known to be thin (T09, T13, T16).

layers.Foundation: Topics T00, T01, T1b, T02–T04 — biological vocabulary and disease framing. Read first.
layers.Clinical: Topics T05–T11 — diagnosis, treatment, management. Presuppose Foundation layer.
layers.Context/Future: Topics T12–T16 — equity, pediatric, AI, frontiers. Most meaningful after Clinical layer.

topics.why_it_matters: Quantitative global frame; geographic diversity; disease scale worldwide
RRMS/SPMS/PPMS/CIS/RIS taxonomy; diagnostic criteria; prerequisite vocabulary for all other topics
Pre-DMT disease trajectory; disability progression independent of relapses; baseline for treatment effect measurement
Demyelination vs neurodegeneration duality; lesion biology; why peripheral immune drugs fail in progressive MS
HLA architecture; 200+ GWAS loci; polygenic risk; why MS is an immune-dysregulation disease
EBV; vitamin D; smoking; latitude; multi-factor model; emerging vs settled science
MRI criteria; gadolinium; PRL; central vein sign; evolving McDonald criteria
NfL; GFAP; CHI3L1; serum vs CSF; treatment monitoring; prognostic use
DMT classes; escalation vs treat-to-target; B-cell depletion paradigm; progressive MS treatment
PIRA; smoldering inflammation; why relapse suppression ≠ disability prevention; biggest unmet need
EDSS limitations; fatigue; cognition; PRO instruments; trial endpoint gaps; digital health
Depression; anxiety; cognitive impairment; bladder dysfunction; interaction with disability
Relapse-rebound risk; DMT teratogenicity; washout; post-partum; breastfeeding
ADEM differential; neurodevelopmental stakes; IPMSSG criteria; pediatric EBV data
Structural racism; Black/Hispanic disparities; diagnostic delay; access to high-efficacy DMTs
Lesion segmentation; progression prediction; treatment recommendation; implementation gap; explainability
Data-driven reclassification; remyelination; neuroprotection; EBV vaccine prevention
Stop/Restore/End pathways; patient-informed priorities; field-wide strategic agenda; funding alignment
